person.name: Theodora Komnena Herzogin von Österreich
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Theodora Komnene, died 2 January 1184, Latinized Theodora Comnena, was a daughter of the Byzantine prince Andronikos Komnenos and his wife, Eirene (?Aineiadissa). Based on the writings of Niketas Choniates, it is likely Theodora was Andronikos' second daughter. The year of Theodora's birth is unknown.

«b»Life and Death«/b»
Little is known of Theodora's early life, except that her father died in 1142. She does not appear in the historical record again until the late 1140s, when she was betrothed to and married Henry II of Austria, whose first wife, Gertrude of Supplingenburg had died in 1143. The marriage had been arranged by her uncle, Manuel I and her eventual husband's half-brother, Conrad III of Germany, during the latter's stay in Constantinople.

Theodora and Henry were married in Constantinople, and subsequently granted the Duchy of Austria by Frederick I Barbarossa in 1156.

Theodora died on 2 January 1184.

«b»Family«/b»
Theodora had three children by her husband Henry:

1.) Agnès (?1154-13 January 1182) married to Stephen III of Hungary

2.) Leopold V, Duke of Austria (1157-31 December 1194)

3.) Henry, Duke of Mödling (1158-31 August 1223) married Richeza of Bohemia, daughter of Vladislaus II, Duke of Bohemia.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Theodora Komnena Herzogin von Österreich於大約1125年出生在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه易斯坦波爾易斯坦波爾時，她的父親Andronikos Komnenos19歲，母親Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev,24歲。她於大約1148年與Heinrich II. Herzog von Bayern und Österreich在土耳其易斯坦波爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1184年1月2日在奧地利維恩享年60歲，埋葬在奧地利維恩。

Herzog von Bayern und Österreich在土耳其易斯坦波爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1184年1月2日在奥地利維恩享年60岁，埋葬在奥地利維恩。

nameMeanings.name: Theodora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Theodore  , borne most notably by a 9th-century empress of Byzantium, the wife of Theophilus the Iconoclast. It means ‘gift of God’ the elements are the same as those of   Dorothea  , but in reverse order.

en.lifeSummary: When Theodora Komnena Herzogin von Österreich was born about 1125, in İstanbul, İstanbul, Ottoman Empire, her father, Andronikos Komnenos, was 19 and her mother, Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev,, was 24. She married Heinrich II. Herzog von Bayern und Österreich about 1148, in İstanbul, Türkiye. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 2 January 1184, in Vienna, Austria, at the age of 60, and was buried in Vienna, Austria.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theodora Komnena Herzogin von Österreich est née environ 1125, à İstanbul, İstanbul, Empire ottoman, son père, Andronikos Komnenos, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev,, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich II. Herzog von Bayern und Österreich environ 1148, à İstanbul, Turquie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 janvier 1184, à Vienne, Autriche, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Vienne, Autriche.

de.lifeSummary: Als Theodora Komnena Herzogin von Österreich um 1125 in İstanbul, İstanbul, Osmanisches Reich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andronikos Komnenos 19 und ihre Mutter Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev, 24. Sie hat um 1148 in İstanbul, Türkei Heinrich II. Herzog von Bayern und Österreich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. Januar 1184 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Wien, Österreich und wurde in Wien, Österreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theodora Komnena Herzogin von Österreich è nata il circa 1125 nel İstanbul, İstanbul, Impero ottomano, sua padre, Andronikos Komnenos, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev,, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich II. Herzog von Bayern und Österreich circa 1148, nel İstanbul, Turchia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 gennaio 1184, nel Wien, Austria, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Wien, Austria.

ja.lifeSummary: Theodora Komnena Herzogin von Österreichが約1125年にオスマン帝国イスタンブルイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Andronikos Komnenosは19歳，母Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev,は24歳であった。約1148年にトルコイスタンブルでHeinrich II. Herzog von Bayern und Österreichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1184年1月2日にオーストリアウィンで60歳で死去し，オーストリアウィンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Theodora Komnena Herzogin von Österreich(이)가 대략 1125년 دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه 이스탠불 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andronikos Komnenos(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev,(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1148년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 Heinrich II. Herzog von Bayern und Österreich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1184년 1월 2일 오스트리아 빈에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트리아 빈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theodora Komnena Herzogin von Österreich nasceu aproximadamente 1125, em İstanbul, İstanbul, Império Otomano, seu pai, Andronikos Komnenos, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev,, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich II. Herzog von Bayern und Österreich aproximadamente 1148, em İstanbul, Turquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1184, em Wien, Áustria, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Wien, Áustria.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theodora Komnena Herzogin von Österreich родилась около 1125 г. в местности истанбул, истанбул, Османская империя, её отцу по имени Andronikos Komnenos было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev,, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich II. Herzog von Bayern und Österreich около 1148 г. в местности истанбул, Турция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 января 1184 г. в местности Вена, Австрия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности Вена, Австрия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theodora Komnena Herzogin von Österreich nació aproximadamente 1125, en İstanbul, İstanbul, Imperio otomano, su papá, Andronikos Komnenos, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Irina Evpraksia Rurik Mstislavna Princess of Kiev,, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Heinrich II. Herzog von Bayern und Österreich aproximadamente 1148, en İstanbul, Turquía. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de enero de 1184, en Wien, Austria, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Wien, Austria.
